'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 115''' was the one hundred fifteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 10]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Freedon Nadd Uprising|Naddist Revolt]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong Incursions]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Kyp Durron]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]
*[[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]
*[[FLTCH R-1|Merc Droid]]
*[[Power harpoon launcher|Power Harpoon]]
*[[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|Techno Union Starship]]
